Published 1903 by Guy and Company, Limited in Cork .
Written in English.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Joice d'Alneto於大約1135年出生在英國貝德福爾圖維時，她的父親William d'Alneto6歲，母親Joice d'Engaine16歲。她於1162年與Sir Robert Maunsell結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。她去世於1243年在英國享年109歲。

nameMeanings.name: Joice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Joice d'Alneto was born about 1135, in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, her father, William d'Alneto, was 6 and her mother, Joice d'Engaine, was 16. She married Sir Robert Maunsell in 1162. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. She died in 1243, in England, at the age of 109.

Elle a épousé Sir Robert Maunsell en 1162. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Elle est décédée en 1243, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 109 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joice d'Alnetoが約1135年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビーで生まれた時，父William d'Alnetoは6歳，母Joice d'Engaineは16歳であった。1162年にSir Robert Maunsellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼女は1243年にイギリスで109歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joice d'Alneto(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 베드퍼드실르 터르비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William d'Alneto(은)는 6세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joice d'Engaine(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1162년 Sir Robert Maunsell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 영국에서 109세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joice d'Alneto родилась около 1135 г. в местности турви, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William d'Alneto было 6 лет, а матери, которую звали Joice d'Engaine, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Maunsell в 1162 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Она умерла в 1243 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 109 лет.
